headline: Goldman Sachs (GS) Leaves Russell Growth Indexes For Value And Defensive Benchmarks
summary: Goldman Sachs Group (NYSE:GS) has been reclassified in major Russell indices, moving out of several growth benchmarks into value and defensive categories. The company was removed from the Russell 1000, 3000, 3000E, and Top 200 Growth indices and added to the Russell 1000 Value-Defensive and Russell 1000 Defensive indices. This index reshuffle may influence how passive and institutional investors treat the stock and could alter its role in portfolios focused on growth versus value and...

headline: Gold prices today, Tuesday, June 30: Hanging just above $4,000, but ready to rise?
summary: Gold August futures opened at $4,032.50 per troy ounce on Tuesday, June 30, 2026, down 0.2% from Monday's closing price. The price of gold moved slightly higher this morning to $4,047.20 per troy ounce as of 7:41 a.m. ET.

headline: Chip Stocks’ Best Quarter Ever Is Ending With Some Wild Swings
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Chip stocks are heading for their best quarter ever, extending an extraordinary start to the year driven by insatiable demand for artificial intelligence equipment. But after recent jitters sent the stocks tumbling, investors are wondering how much further the rally can go. headline: Oppenheimer turns cautious on major U.S. banks, favors alternative asset managers
summary: Investing.com -- Oppenheimer downgraded several large U.S. bank stocks on Tuesday, arguing that rich valuations have left little room for further upside despite improving earnings prospects and a favorable operating environment.
